---
title: "About"
subtitle: "Academic background and contact information."
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

::: {.about-grid}
::: {.about-main}
## Biography

Artur Rodrigues is Professor of Finance at the [School of Economics and Management](https://www.up.pt/fep/en/) (FEP), University of Porto.

His research focuses on real options, option valuation, mergers and acquisitions, managerial compensation, and corporate decisions under uncertainty.

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://www.dropbox.com/s/y7h5ue6fbol492u/Artur%20Rodrigues%20cv.pdf?dl=0">Curriculum Vitae</a>
:::

::: {.credentials}
<p class="eyebrow">Academic qualifications</p>

<div class="credential">
<strong>Habilitation</strong>
<span>Business Administration · University of Minho, 2017</span>
</div>

<div class="credential">
<strong>PhD</strong>
<span>Business Administration, Finance · University of Minho, 2006</span>
</div>

<div class="credential">
<strong>MSc</strong>
<span>Business Administration, Corporate Finance · University of Minho, 2000</span>
</div>

<div class="credential">
<strong>BSc</strong>
<span>Economics · University of Porto, 1994</span>
</div>
:::
:::

## Contact {#contact}

::: {.contact-panel}
::: {.contact-block}
<span class="contact-label">Email</span>

[ajrodrigues@fep.up.pt](mailto:ajrodrigues@fep.up.pt)
:::

::: {.contact-block}
<span class="contact-label">Office</span>

Faculdade de Economia da Universidade do Porto  
Rua Dr. Roberto Frias  
4200–464 Porto, Portugal
:::

::: {.contact-block}
<span class="contact-label">Profiles</span>

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E4sUQh0AAAAJ&hl=en) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7279-4490) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/artur-rodrigues-5bb756164)
:::
:::
